title: Earth Eleotoid deals double Atk damage near fire

card.rawText: This card inflicts 2x Atk damage to creatures in or near fire, but receives 2x Atk damage from creatures in or near water.

effect.value: This card inflicts 2x Atk damage to creatures in or near fire, but receives 2x Atk damage from creatures in or near water.

plan.title: Earth Eleotoid deals double Atk damage near fire
